meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve slow development speed (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome slow development speed. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Setup: Accelerate Your Freelance Dev Speed
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code and Antigravity to eliminate slow development cycles. A high-impact, beginner-friendly checklist for freelancers to ship faster than ever.
content.answer_block: The bottleneck in freelance development is manual boilerplate and context switching. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you automate architectural scaffolding and unit testing. This workflow transforms hours of manual coding into minutes of intelligent generation, ensuring you deliver production-ready features while maintaining high-profit margins through extreme speed.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank IDE, the client deadline is looming, and your velocity is being choked by repetitive boilerplate and syntax debugging. Every hour spent manually wiring up API endpoints or chasing minor linting errors is an hour of profit bleeding out of your freelance business. The gap between a struggling developer and a high-earning architect isn't raw coding speed; it's the ability to leverage intelligent automation to handle the mundane.

Today, we shift the paradigm. By configuring Claude Code as your primary agentic partner and leveraging Antigravity for structural precision, you stop writing code and start orchestrating solutions. This isn't just a setup guide—it's your roadmap to reclaiming your time and delivering high-fidelity software at a pace that will make your competitors look like they're working in slow motion.

steps.title: Initialize the Agentic Environment
steps.description: Establish a secure, context-aware bridge between your local filesystem and the Claude CLI agent to ensure it understands your project architecture before writing a single line.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current directory structure and generate a comprehensive 'Project-Context.md' file that maps all dependencies, environment variables, and core business logic modules.

steps.title: Automate Scaffolding with Antigravity
steps.description: Use Antigravity to define your domain models. This prevents the 'blank page' syndrome and ensures your database schema is optimized for scalability from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate an ORM-agnostic schema definition for a multi-tenant SaaS application, including User, Subscription, and Project entities with proper relationship indexing.

steps.title: Inject Contextual Business Logic
steps.description: Feed specific client requirements into Claude Code to transform your scaffolded structure into functional, production-grade features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current scaffold and implement a secure authentication middleware that handles JWT-based session management and role-based access control.

steps.title: Automated Testing & Edge Case Analysis
steps.description: Before delivery, force the AI to stress-test your code against common security vulnerabilities and performance bottlenecks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the latest commits for potential SQL injection points and race conditions. Generate unit tests for all public API endpoints.

steps.title: Deployment-Ready Optimization
steps.description: Clean up your codebase, remove debugging artifacts, and ensure the build script is optimized for your target production environment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the codebase for production optimization. Remove all development logs, minimize bundle size, and generate a README with deployment instructions.

pro_tips: Always maintain a .claudeignore file to prevent the agent from indexing massive node_modules or build artifacts, which saves token costs and improves response accuracy.
Use Antigravity's 'ghost mode' to simulate architectural changes in a sandbox branch before merging them into your main production stream.
When Claude Code gets stuck, provide a snippet of your existing code as a 'style guide' to force the output to match your specific coding standard.
Leverage the 'claude review' command after every major feature merge to catch hidden bugs that standard linters often miss.
Keep your prompt library in a shared repository so you can reuse complex logic patterns across different client projects instantly.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your current project folder structure, then execute the Claude init command to see how the agent interprets your existing architecture. Once comfortable, migrate your next feature request to an Antigravity-driven workflow to experience the speed difference firsthand.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting slow development cycles dictate your freelance income. By mastering these agentic tools, you transform your workflow from manual labor to high-leverage engineering. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
